title: Crafted with intention. Served with quiet confidence.
subtitle: Every element of the evening — from the linen to the last bite — is composed to feel inevitable.

items.title: Open-Fire Kitchen
items.description: A wood-fired hearth at the heart of the room, coaxing depth from heritage produce and dry-aged proteins.

items.title: Farm-First Sourcing
items.description: We work with twelve regional growers within ninety miles. Menus shift the morning the deliveries arrive.

items.title: Curated Cellar
items.description: An evolving 320-label list led by our head sommelier, with quiet bottles, low-intervention finds and grand cru.

items.title: Counted Seats
items.description: Twelve covers per service. Two seatings a night. Designed for unhurried, intimate evenings.
